overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 capturing a sweeping traverse along the Night City outskirts. The camera glides above a multi-lane highway, transitioning from an amusement district with a prominent ferris wheel to an industrial corridor dominated by a massive corporate retaining wall carved into red rock cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with amusement park ferris wheel

agents.ego_description: drone flying forward and leftward capturing the urban landscape and highway interchange

entered.detail: large white amusement park ferris wheel with lattice structure
cluster of futuristic glass and steel high-rise buildings forming the city skyline
multi-lane curved highway with on-ramps and traffic markings
low-rise suburban housing with red-tiled roofs and palm trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a futuristic city outskirts. A large ferris wheel dominates the right side while the downtown skyline rises in the distance. The camera glides above a highway interchange surrounded by residential areas with sparse traffic visible on the roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor with emerging rocky cliff and corporate wall

events.description: massive corporate retaining wall with 'PETROCHAD' logo becomes visible on left, ferris wheel exits right of frame

agents.ego_description: drone continuing along highway trajectory as landscape transitions from amusement district to industrial zone

entered.detail: massive concrete retaining wall with corporate logo and text carved into red rock face
steep reddish-brown rock formation rising alongside the highway
large rectangular advertising structure with digital display near highway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions as the camera moves past the amusement district. A massive corporate wall with the Petrochad logo emerges on the left, carved into the rocky cliffside. The ferris wheel disappears from view while a highway billboard becomes visible on the right, and the residential district begins to recede.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway cutting through steep rock face

agents.ego_description: drone gliding parallel to the highway alongside the massive corporate retaining wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the highway corridor flanked by the imposing Petrochad wall and rocky cliff on the left, now dominating the foreground. The camera maintains a steady aerial path as the residential areas and billboard pass out of view, leaving the industrial infrastructure and sparse highway traffic as the primary subjects.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide from a vibrant amusement district toward a stark, industrial corridor carved into red rock cliffs. It begins with a wide view of the city outskirts, gliding over a highway interchange with a large ferris wheel to the right and the distant downtown skyline on the horizon. As the camera moves forward, the amusement district recedes and the ferris wheel disappears, giving way to a massive corporate wall bearing the Petrochad logo that emerges from the rocky cliffside on the left. The scene then shifts as a highway billboard passes on the right and the residential areas fade away, narrowing the focus to the highway corridor. Finally, the camera maintains its steady path, leaving the industrial infrastructure and the imposing cliff wall to dominate the landscape above the sparse traffic below.
